name: @tootallnate/ff7-world
description: Pure-JS decoder for FF7 PC's overworld map files (`wm0.map`, `wm2.map`, `wm3.map`). Parses the 0xB800-byte section grid, decompresses each per-sector LZSS-wrapped mesh into a flat triangle list with per-triangle texture IDs / walkmap codes / region IDs, and exposes the hardcoded WMSET texture metadata tables (282 overworld + 8 underwater + 4 glacier entries with PSX VRAM offsets). Pairs with `@tootallnate/lgp` to extract the matching `.tex` files from `world_us.lgp`.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
